# Digital Penta

> Digital marketing agency based in Delhi, India serving clients across India and the Middle East. We deliver SEO, Google & Meta Ads, social media, web development, and AI automation that drives measurable revenue growth.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What Digital Penta does and why 500+ brands trust us.
- [About](/about): Our story, team, and 4.9★ track record.
- [Services — Digital Marketing](/services/digital-marketing): SEO, PPC, social, content, email, performance.
- [Services — Web & App Development](/services/development): Custom websites, e-commerce, mobile apps.
- [Services — AI Solutions](/services/ai-solutions): AI chatbots, automation, custom GPTs.
- [Services — Public Relations](/services/public-relations): Brand reputation, PR, digital PR.
- [Services — Automation](/services/automation): Workflow automation and integrations.
- [Portfolio](/portfolio): Case studies and client outcomes.
- [Blog](/blog): SEO playbooks, ad strategy, 2026 marketing trends.
- [Free Tools](/tools): SEO audit, growth score, ad copy, meta tags, blog outline, competitor X-ray, ROI predictor.
- [Pricing Calculator](/pricing-calculator): Instant project pricing.
- [Get Proposal](/get-proposal): Custom growth proposal in 24 hours.
- [Book a Strategy Call](/book-a-call): Free 30-minute consultation.
- [Contact](/contact): Email support@digitalpenta.com or +91-88601-00039.
